business.title: New OTR framework for Equity Options from April 6, exchanges issue circular
business.description: The Order-to-Trade Ratio (OTR) measures the number of orders placed—including modifications and cancellations—relative to the number of trades executed by a trading member. A high OTR indicates excessive order placement with relatively low execution, creating ‘noise’ in the system.

ai.title: AI evolution decoded: Ace investor Vijay Kedia explains it with a simple house-building analogy
ai.description: Veteran investor Vijay Kedia explains AI's evolution using a house-building analogy, from expert advice (LLMs) to autonomous action (agents), collaborative teams (multi-agent), human-level mastery (AGI), and beyond (superintelligence). This framework mirrors his investment philosophy: learn, earn, evolve. However, Kedia's portfolio faced a challenging FY26, with most holdings declining amid market pressures and geopolitical concerns.
